Name: Azoth
Description: In the distant past, before man first crawled from the slime, Azoth was a god on Earth. In battle with another god, Azoth's horn was torn from his brow by another god. Azoth's body died, petrifying and forming what would become known as Azoth's peak, in what would become Zamora in the Hyborian era.
FirstComicTitle: Conan the Barbarian: The Horn of Azoth #1
